title: Gefen Galleries | Gefen Gallery
content: 315 Grant Avenue, San Francisco, California. ## 315 Grant Avenue. Our flagship gallery on Grant Avenue is an opulent space encompassing over 6,000 square feet and spanning five levels of contemporary gallery space. Complete with a refined top-floor bar and entertainment system, this space is designed to elevate the visitor experience. Situated in a historic building on San Francisco's oldest street, once named Calle De La Fundacion and Dupont Ave, this location holds a rich history. It was the inaugural abode of the illustrious Boudin Bakery Cart in 1849. Later, it played host to Frank Lloyd Wright's west coast office until 1959, and subsequently became the cherished headquarters of Frank Lloyd Wright's Charity Foundation. 950 Mason Street | Fairmont Hotel , San Francisco, California. ## 950 Mason Street | Fairmont Hotel. Nestled within the main lobby of the Historic Fairmont Hotel, our gallery presents 2500 square feet of ever-changing exhibition space, carefully curated to highlight our featured artists. Gefen seamlessly blends a modern, contemporary aesthetic with the opulent, iconic surroundings.
